args: 根据 design/原型设计.pen 在当前仓库构建完整 LLM Info 前端

handoff.summary: Built the complete Pencil-defined LLM Info frontend with Next.js App Router, responsive navigation and dialogs, system/manual dark mode, Chinese/English UI, native models.json consumption, Vercel production output, and full test evidence.

decisions.text: Keep the full catalog on the server and send only current page/dialog data to clients.
Use native dialog for viewport-centered modals and mobile focus isolation.
Preserve native currency, source, model, provider, and Quality evidence without translation or FX conversion.
完整目录在 Server Components 聚合，仅向客户端发送当前页面或弹框数据。
使用原生 dialog 实现整页居中、焦点隔离及移动抽屉。
保持原生币种、缺价、免费、来源和 Quality 证据语义，不翻译原始数据、不做汇率换算。

concerns: Full catalog grouping runs once per cold server process and may need a precomputed read model if data grows substantially.
Remote Vercel deployment was not executed; the standard local Next.js production build passed.
未执行远程 Vercel 发布，仅验证标准 Next.js production build。
目录冷启动会进行一次完整数据聚合，数据显著增长后可考虑预计算只读视图。
